expectations.text: The output fetches data from the Fireblocks Greenhouse API endpoint (boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/fireblocks/jobs)
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2 shows: 'Tool: WebFetch, URL: https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/fireblocks/jobs'. Results.md header confirms 'Source: Greenhouse API (https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/fireblocks/jobs)'.

expectations.text: Results include specific job titles (not just 'jobs available')
expectations.evidence: Results.md lists 30 specific job titles in tables, e.g., 'Application Security Engineer', 'Senior Backend Engineer, Key Management', 'Senior Full-Stack Engineer, DX', 'Technical Integration Engineer', etc.

expectations.text: Results include apply URLs or links for individual positions
expectations.evidence: Every job listing includes a Greenhouse apply link, e.g., '[Apply](https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/fireblocks/jobs/4659362006)' for Application Security Engineer, and similar for all 30 listed positions.

expectations.text: Results mention location information for jobs
expectations.evidence: Israel-based positions are labeled 'Tel Aviv, Israel'. The complete engineering list includes locations like 'Belgrade, Serbia', 'Warsaw, Poland', 'Prague, Czech Republic', 'New York, USA', 'Latin America (Remote)', 'Toronto, Canada', etc.

expectations.text: Output is formatted as a readable list or table (not raw JSON)
expectations.evidence: Results are formatted as Markdown tables with columns (Title, Department, Salary, Apply Link) and organized under section headers (Israel-Based, Potentially Relevant, All Engineering Roles). No raw JSON in output.

claims.evidence: The WebFetch call returned 65 positions per the transcript, and the results header confirms 'Total open positions: 65'.
The results list 17 Israel-based positions across the Engineering and Non-Engineering Israel tables (10 engineering + 7 non-engineering). The count is consistent.

claims.claim: No junior or entry-level positions found
claims.evidence: All engineering titles listed contain 'Senior', 'Staff', 'Lead', or 'Director' except 3 roles (Application Security Engineer, Information Security Engineer, Technical Integration Engineer) which the output correctly notes as potentially more flexible.

suggestions.assertion: The output fetches data from the Fireblocks Greenhouse API endpoint (boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/fireblocks/jobs)
suggestions.reason: This assertion is skill-specific and will trivially fail for without_skill runs since those won't know to use the Greenhouse API. This is by design for differentiating skill vs no-skill, but it should be acknowledged that this assertion measures skill knowledge, not output quality.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are solid and test meaningful outcomes. The Greenhouse API assertion is the key discriminator between skill and no-skill runs.
